chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – Waiting period of the woman with irregular menstruations

text: سَهْلُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْكَرِيمِ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ عِدَّةُ الَّتِي لَمْ تَحِضْ وَ الْمُسْتَحَاضَةِ الَّتِي لَا تَطْهُرُ ثَلَاثَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَ عِدَّةُ الَّتِي تَحِيضُ وَ يَسْتَقِيمُ حَيْضُهَا ثَلَاثَةُ قُرُوءٍ وَ الْقُرُوءُ جَمْعُ الدَّمِ بَيْنَ الْحَيْضَتَيْنِ.

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad, from Abdul Kareem, from Abu Baseer, from

Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The waiting period of the woman who does not menstruate and the woman suffering from menstrual bleeding from which she is not pure, is of three months; and the waiting period of the woman who menstruates, and her menstruation is straight, is of three Quroo (pure periods), and Al-Quroo is the coagulation of the blood between the two menstruations’.
